Who We Are

Human Accuracy
Software Can't Match

True Trace Measurements delivers professional, Xactimate-ready roof measurement reports to roofing contractors, public adjusters, and insurance companies across all 50 states.

Every report is hand-traced and manually verified by a certified estimator — not generated by automation. When complex rooflines, tree coverage, or rural properties defeat automated tools, we deliver.

✦Certified Xactimate estimators on every job
✦ESX files that open directly in Xactimate — no redrawing
✦Complex, commercial, and blueprint jobs accepted
✦Free revision guarantee on every report
✦24-hour standard turnaround, 12-hour rush available

01
Simple Residential
Standard single-family homes with straightforward rooflines. Squares, pitch, all linear measurements, waste factor, and ESX file included.
$35/report
→
PDFESX12–24hr
02
Complex Residential
Larger homes with multiple facets, dormers, turrets, or irregular shapes automated tools get wrong. Full breakdown + ESX.
$55/report
→
PDFESX24hr

Simple Commercial
Small commercial buildings, flat roofs, single-slope structures up to 50 squares. Full measurements and Xactimate-compatible ESX.
$65/report
→
PDFESX24hr
04
Complex Commercial
Large commercial, multi-section roofs, warehouses above 50 squares. Where automated software fails, our CAD-verified team delivers.
$95/report

PDFESX48hr

Multi-Family / Apartment
Apartment buildings, duplexes, townhomes, HOA communities. Multiple structures measured in one comprehensive report.

Deliverables
What's Inside
Every Report

Every report is manually verified before delivery. You receive two files — a detailed PDF and an ESX file ready for Xactimate.

📄 PDF Report — Detailed Visual Output
✔
Total Roof Area — squares with waste factor table at 10%, 12%, 15%
✔
Pitch / Slope Breakdown — every facet labeled with exact pitch value
✔
Linear Measurements — ridge, rake, hip, valley, eave, flashing lengths
✔
3D Color-Coded Roof Diagram — visual facet map for quick reference
✔
Aerial Property Image — high-resolution satellite view with roof outlined
✔
Ice & Water Shield Areas — eave and valley areas pre-calculated
✔
Penetrations & Skylights — counted and noted where visible from aerial
💾 ESX File — Xactimate Ready
✔
Direct Xactimate Import — open instantly, sketch pre-loaded, no redrawing
✔
All Facets Pre-drawn — every section mapped with correct dimensions
✔
Pitch Values Embedded — each facet carries its pitch for auto calculations
✔
Edge Types Classified — ridge, rake, hip, valley, eave labeled correctly
✔
Waste Factor Pre-set — default 10%, adjustable inside Xactimate
✔
Symbility XML Available — on request at no additional charge
✔
Human QC Verified — reviewed by a certified estimator before every delivery
How It Works
From Submission
to Delivery
1
Submit Your Job
Fill out our simple order form with the property address, report type, and any special notes. Attach blueprints if ordering a blueprint-based report.
Takes 2 minutes
2
We Confirm & Invoice
We confirm receipt within 1 hour and send a payment invoice. Work begins immediately upon payment confirmation via Payoneer or bank transfer.
Within 1 hour
3
Certified Estimator Measures
Our Xactimate-certified estimator manually traces and measures every roof facet using high-resolution aerial imagery. No automation, no shortcuts.
12–24 hours
4
Quality Control Review
Every report is reviewed for accuracy before delivery — pitch values, linear measurements, and ESX file integrity are all verified against our 99% accuracy standard.
Before every delivery
5
PDF + ESX Delivered
Both files delivered to your email within the guaranteed turnaround window. Open the ESX in Xactimate instantly — the sketch is complete and ready to estimate.
On time, guaranteed
Hand-Traced in Xactimate
Address → Nearmap → Xactimate → ESX + PDF
Why TrueTrace
The Difference
You'll Notice Immediately

When you open our ESX file in Xactimate — every facet is drawn, every pitch is set, every edge is labeled. No redrawing, no corrections, no time wasted.

🎯
99% Accuracy, Guaranteed
Every report manually verified by a certified estimator. If measurements are off, we correct it free within 4 hours — no questions asked.
⚡
12–24hr Turnaround
Standard delivery in 24 hours. Rush 12-hour delivery for urgent jobs. We have never missed a deadline in our operating history.
🌲
No Property Too Complex
Tree-covered, rural, irregular, or blueprint-only — we handle what every automated tool refuses. Complex roofs are our specialty.
💾
ESX Opens Instantly
Full sketch pre-loaded in Xactimate. No redrawing, no manual entry. Open the file and start adding line items immediately.
💰
Pay Per Report
No monthly subscription. No minimum orders. Order one report or one hundred — same price, same quality, same turnaround.
🔁
Free Revision Policy
Every report comes with a free revision within 24 hours of delivery. Your accuracy is our responsibility, not yours.

How We Compare
Feature TrueTrace ✦ Automated Tools
Complex & irregular rooflines✔ Fully supported⚠ Often inaccurate
Tree-covered properties✔ Manual verification✘ Frequently fails
